# Kopern — AI Agent Builder, Orchestrator & Grader (Full Reference)

> Build, test, deploy, and connect production-grade AI agents with tool calling, deterministic grading, multi-agent teams, MCP endpoints, and external connectors.

## Platform Overview

Kopern is a SaaS platform for creating custom AI agents. Unlike simple chatbot builders, Kopern provides:
1. **Full tool calling** — agents can execute custom JavaScript functions with JSON Schema validation
2. **Deterministic grading** — automated test suites validate agent behavior before deployment
3. **Multi-agent orchestration** — teams and pipelines for complex workflows
4. **External deployment** — embed agents on websites, connect to webhooks, or install as Slack bots
5. **Self-optimization** — AutoResearch lab with 6 modes for automatic prompt improvement

## Agent Configuration

Each agent has:
- **System Prompt**: Core behavior instructions
- **Model**: Choose from 15+ LLMs across 5 providers
- **Skills**: Markdown templates injected as XML context (reusable knowledge blocks)
- **Custom Tools**: JSON Schema input + sandboxed JS code — agents call these like functions
- **Built-in Tools**: `read_file`, `search_files`, `github_write` (auto-enabled when repos connected)
- **Extensions**: Lifecycle hooks triggered on 30+ events (tool_call_start, tool_call_end, message_sent, etc.)
- **Purpose Gate**: A question asked at session start to scope the conversation
- **TillDone Mode**: Agent keeps working until the task is complete (auto-prompting)
- **Branding**: Custom avatar, icon, and accent color
- **Tool Overrides**: Temperature, max tokens, thinking level per agent
- **Connected Repos**: GitHub repositories accessible via OAuth

## LLM Providers & Models

| Provider | Models | Tool Calling |
|----------|--------|-------------|
| Anthropic | Claude Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5 | Native tool_use blocks |
| OpenAI | GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini | Function calling |
| Google | Gemini 2.5 Flash | functionCall |
| Mistral AI | Mistral Large, Codestral, Nemo | Function calling |
| Ollama | Any local model | Via OpenAI-compatible API |

All models support streaming via SSE (Server-Sent Events).

## Grading System

6 criterion types for automated agent evaluation:
1. **output_match**: Exact or fuzzy text matching
2. **schema_validation**: JSON Schema validation of agent output
3. **tool_usage**: Verify the agent called specific tools with expected parameters
4. **safety_check**: Ensure agent doesn't produce harmful content
5. **custom_script**: Run arbitrary JavaScript assertions
6. **llm_judge**: Use another LLM to evaluate quality

Grading runs are persisted to Firestore with full results history.

## AutoResearch — Optimization Lab

| Mode | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| AutoTune | Optimize system prompts against grading suites automatically |
| AutoFix | Diagnose and patch failing test cases |
| Stress Lab | Adversarial testing with edge-case generation |
| Tournament | Arena-style prompt variant comparison |
| Distillation | Transfer prompt effectiveness to cheaper models |
| Evolution | Genetic algorithm-based prompt evolution |

## Multi-Agent Orchestration

### Agent Teams
- **Parallel**: All agents run simultaneously, results aggregated
- **Sequential**: Agents run one after another, each sees prior context
- **Conditional**: Input routed to specific agent based on rules

### Pipelines
- Sequential chains where step N's output becomes step N+1's input
- Input/output mapping between steps
- Each step can use different tools and models

### Sub-Agent Delegation
- Agents can delegate subtasks to other agents in your workspace

## External Connectors

### Embeddable Chat Widget
```html
<script src="https://kopern.vercel.app/api/widget/script" data-key="kpn_xxx"></script>
```
- Shadow DOM for CSS isolation
- SSE streaming responses
- Markdown rendering (headers, code, lists, links)
- Mobile-responsive (full-screen < 640px)
- "Powered by Kopern" badge (removable on Pro+)
- CORS whitelist per widget
- Custom welcome message and position (bottom-right/left)

### Webhooks
**Inbound**: External services send JSON to your agent
```
POST /api/webhook/{agentId}?key=kpn_xxx
Content-Type: application/json

{"message": "New order received", "data": {...}}
→ {"response": "Order processed...", "metrics": {...}}
```

**Outbound**: Agent fires webhooks on events
- Events: `message_sent`, `tool_call_completed`, `session_ended`, `error`
- HMAC-SHA256 signing via `X-Webhook-Signature` header
- Compatible with n8n, Zapier, Make

**Anti-loop protection**: Inbound webhooks never trigger outbound webhooks.

### Slack Bot
- OAuth install flow via dashboard
- Responds to @mentions and DMs
- Thread support (maintains conversation in threads)
- Reaction checkmark on processed messages
- Events API (serverless-compatible)

## MCP Protocol (Model Context Protocol)

Any Kopern agent can be used as an MCP server:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "my-agent": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://kopern.vercel.app/api/mcp/server",
      "headers": { "Authorization": "Bearer kpn_..." }
    }
  }
}
```

Available MCP tools:
- `kopern_chat`: Send a message to the agent and get a response
- `kopern_agent_info`: Get agent metadata (name, model, tools, skills)

Compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP client.

## Bug Tracking System

Built-in bug reporting and autonomous fixing:
- Site-wide bug report dialog (available on every page)
- Bug Fixer agent auto-triggered on new reports
- Admin dashboard with KPI stats, status filters, notes timeline
- Email notifications for reporters
- Agent can create GitHub branches and pull requests

## Billing & Plans

| Feature | Starter (Free) | Pro ($79/mo) | Usage | Enterprise ($499/mo) |
|---------|----------------|--------------|-------|---------------------|
| Agents | 3 | 25 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Tokens/month | 100K | 2M | Pay per use | Unlimited |
| Grading runs | 10/mo | 200/mo | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Teams | 0 | 5 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Pipelines | 0 | 10 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| MCP servers | 1 | 5 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| Connectors | 0 | 3 | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| AutoResearch | No | Yes | Yes | Yes |

Usage-based billing via Stripe Billing Meters. Real-time token tracking per agent.

## Technical Architecture

- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript strict
- **UI**: shadcn/ui + Radix UI + Tailwind CSS 4 + Framer Motion 12
- **Database**: Firebase Firestore (real-time subscriptions via onSnapshot)
- **Auth**: Firebase Auth (Google, GitHub with `repo` scope, Email/Password)
- **Payments**: Stripe (subscriptions, usage meters, customer portal, 9 webhook events)
- **Streaming**: Server-Sent Events for all agent interactions
- **Sandbox**: Node.js vm module for custom tool execution (5s timeout)
- **i18n**: Custom system with JSON dictionaries, `[locale]` route segment

## API Reference

| Method | Endpoint | Auth | Response |
|--------|----------|------|----------|
| POST | /api/agents/{id}/chat | Session | SSE stream |
| POST | /api/agents/{id}/grading/{suiteId}/run | Session | SSE stream |
| POST | /api/agents/{id}/autoresearch/* | Session | SSE stream |
| POST | /api/agents/{id}/pipelines/{id}/execute | Session | SSE stream |
| POST | /api/teams/{id}/execute | Session | SSE stream |
| POST | /api/agents/meta-create | Session | SSE stream |
| POST | /api/mcp/server | API Key | JSON-RPC |
| POST | /api/widget/chat | API Key | SSE stream |
| GET | /api/widget/config | API Key | JSON |
| POST | /api/webhook/{agentId} | API Key | JSON |
| POST | /api/slack/events | Slack signature | JSON |
| GET | /api/slack/install | Session | Redirect |
| POST | /api/stripe/checkout | Session | JSON |
| POST | /api/stripe/webhook | Stripe signature | JSON |

## Pages

| URL | Content | SEO |
|-----|---------|-----|
| `/en` | Landing page with inline agent creator | Indexed |
| `/en/examples` | 15+ agent templates gallery | Indexed |
| `/en/pricing` | 4 pricing tiers with feature comparison | Indexed |
| `/en/docs` | Full documentation with search | Indexed |
| `/fr` | French landing page | Indexed |
| `/fr/examples` | French examples | Indexed |
| `/fr/pricing` | French pricing | Indexed |
| `/fr/docs` | French documentation | Indexed |
| `/*/dashboard` | User dashboard | Not indexed |
| `/*/agents/*` | Agent editor | Not indexed |
